title: Identify Opportunities
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Identify Opportunities
Ready to begin the search for jobs, internships, or fellowships? In addition to connecting you to relevant websites and events, the Center for Career Development (CCD) can help with proactive strategies for your search, such as networking and making speculative applications.
The Job Search
Resources for your job search, in China and abroad.
Career Fair & OCR Sessions
On campus career fairs and recruitment sessions connect students to potential employers.
Global Awards & Fellowships
Explore fellowships for continued study and research.
Work and Intern in China
Explore how to intern off campus, or stay in China to work after graduation.
On-Campus Job
Working on campus allows students to take advantage of the resources within the University and gain real work experience.
Handshake
Use your Net ID to sign onto Handshake and to find career recommendations based on your major, interests and network.
